containerStyle: background-image: url('https://dspl.innogamescdn.com/graphic/popup/contents_background.png'); background-repeat: repeat; background-color: #3b2112; border: 1px solid #7d510f; border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 0; box-shadow: 2px 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
itemStyle: display: block; padding: 12px; color: rgb(240, 212, 154); text-decoration: none; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-shadow: 1px 1px 1px #000; transition: background 0.2s;
